description: Policy engine test: a requester policy specifies tier_min but no issuers constraint. Per Section 8.3 and Section 11 (tier semantics are issuer-anchored), a conforming policy engine SHOULD reject this policy as incomplete.
note: This vector does not test Posture Assertion verification directly. It tests the policy evaluation layer. The Posture Assertion is well-formed and would pass all cryptographic checks. The failure is that the policy itself violates the requirement in Sections 8.3/11 that tier_min be paired with an issuers constraint.

requester_policy_INVALID.note: No issuers constraint. Per Sections 8.3/11, this policy is incomplete.

expected.note: The Posture Assertion is valid; the policy is malformed. A conforming policy engine SHOULD refuse to evaluate this policy. POLICY_INCOMPLETE_TIER_NO_ISSUER is a proposed reason code for this case.
